title: AIDOS Manifest
description: Configuration for AIDOS artifact publishing and write strategy

write.description: Write strategy for the GitHub MCP connector

strategy.description: How changes integrate: 'pr' opens a pull request, 'push' merges directly, 'staged' merges into a persistent staging branch that has a rolling PR to target

target.description: Final target branch. For 'pr'/'push' this is where changes land; for 'staged' this is the base of the rolling PR from the staging branch

staging_branch.description: Persistent staging branch between working branches and target. Only consulted when strategy is 'staged'. Default: 'aidos'

reviewers.description: GitHub usernames or @team-names to request PR review from
